insight: Player-vs-mob collision pushing is vanilla physics and is NOT disabled by NoAI or the Knockback Resistance attribute (both only stop self-movement and damage-knockback). To lock a boss in place against players walking into it, the boss entity needs entity.setCollidable(false) (Bukkit 1.9+, exposed via CompProperty.COLLIDABLE). Boss 6.x+ exposes this through the per-boss Settings menu as the "Collidable" CustomSetting.
